overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a gothic great hall with floating candles, long dining tables filled with students, and a ghostly figure gliding down the central aisle. The camera moves steadily forward through the hall toward large stained glass windows, capturing the warm candlelit atmosphere and detailed stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: The camera walks steadily through a vast gothic great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Long dining tables line both sides filled with students, while a translucent ghost glides down the central aisle ahead. The hall features towering stone pillars, high vaulted ceilings, and a massive stained glass window at the far end, all rendered in warm candlelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a vast gothic great hall that transitions from a crowded, candlelit interior toward a distant architectural focal point. It begins by moving past long dining tables filled with students, where thousands of floating candles cast a warm glow across towering stone pillars and high vaulted ceilings. As the camera advances, it tracks a translucent ghost gliding down the central aisle, drawing the viewer deeper into the atmospheric space. The scene then opens up to reveal the full scale of the hall before finally centering on a massive, intricate stained glass window at the far end.
